title: crepidomanes boninense
intro: Crepidomanes boninense, also known as Bonin forked tongue fern, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crepidomanes boninense include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help in relieving symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Crepidomanes boninense is often used as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Asian medicine to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
